goal: Map recurring human and third-party bot work observed in managed/reference servers to official Paradise bot automation without selfbots or user-token automation.

implementedThisPass.trigger: Member joins the Join to Create voice channel
implementedThisPass.automation: Create a temporary voice room, move the member, grant owner controls, post a control panel, clean up when empty
Premium welcome embed plus private welcome/leave logs

implementedThisPass.trigger: Rate-limited chat activity and non-AFK voice presence
implementedThisPass.automation: Persist XP, calculate levels, log level-ups, refresh one in-place leaderboard

implementedThisPass.trigger: 13:00 Europe/Berlin in Paradise Clan template or staff test command
implementedThisPass.automation: Post one question, atomically lock first correct winner, show winner-only reward controls
implementedThisPass.reward: 25 Robux manual owner review; Paradise never auto-pays
implementedThisPass.claim: Winner submits only an official Roblox/Create Roblox gamepass URL; owner DM and private log fallback
implementedThisPass.fallback: The /answer command works without privileged Message Content intent

alreadyImplementedOrPresent: Roblox short-code verification and fighter profiles

availability, cooldown, immunity and LOA boards

backup, preview, repair, guide-only and typed destructive confirmation

rules: Wick-style logs without copying Wick branding
